mapper.select: /*CsBookingMapper.checkBookingAvailableByDt*/ SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(PER_CNT - RES_CNT) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS REMAIN_YN FROM ( SELECT A.CS_RES_DT, A.CS_RES_TM, A.PER_CNT, FN_GET_CODENM@DL_MSP('VOC0024',A.CS_RES_TM)AS CS_RES_TM_NM, (SELECT COUNT(CS_RES_SEQ) FROM MSP_CS_RES_CSTMR@DL_MSP B WHERE B.CS_RES_DT=#{csResDt} AND B.CS_RES_TM= A.CS_RES_TM AND NVL(B.DEL_YN, 'N') != 'Y') AS RES_CNT FROM MSP_CS_RES@DL_MSP A WHERE A.CS_RES_DT = #{csResDt} ) WHERE TO_DATE(#{csResDt}, 'YYYYMMDD') > SYSDATE

/*CsBookingMapper.bookingTotalCount*/ SELECT COUNT(CS_RES_SEQ)AS CNT FROM MSP_CS_RES_CSTMR@DL_MSP WHERE 1=1 AND USR_ID= #{usrId} AND NVL(DEL_YN,'N')!='Y' AND TO_DATE(CS_RES_DT || '235959','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')>= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-3)

/*CsBookingMapper.bookingList*/ SELECT A.CS_RES_SEQ, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.REGST_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY.MM.DD')AS REGST_DT, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.CS_RES_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY.MM.DD')AS CS_RES_DT, A.VOC_THI, A.CS_SUBJECT, A.CS_CONTENT, B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS unSvcNo, FN_GET_CODENM@DL_MSP('VOC0024',A.CS_RES_TM)AS CS_RES_TM, FN_GET_CODENM@DL_MSP('VOC0028',A.VOC_DTL)AS VOC_DTL, (CASE WHEN A.CS_STAT_CD='TRS' THEN '진행중' WHEN A.CS_STAT_CD='COM' THEN '완료' ELSE '미처리' END) AS CS_STAT_CD FROM MSP_CS_RES_CSTMR@DL_MSP A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_MSP B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND USR_ID=#{usrId} AND NVL(DEL_YN,'N')!='Y' AND TO_DATE(CS_RES_DT || '235959','YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')>= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-3) ORDER BY REGST_DTTM DESC
